description:
Creates a log file containing the list of all game entities in scene. The file is created in the same directory as [[Crash_Files|.rpt file]]. {{Feature|informative|[[BattlEye]]'s RCON variant of this command is {{hl|#logEntities}} (see also [[Multiplayer Server Commands]]).}} File name example: {{hl|logEntities_4688_12-04-2014_12-19-39.log}}
File content example:
